en: Can you fix this sentence?
ko: 이 문장을 고칠 수 있나요? I am living in Bangalore since 2003.
ja: この文を直せますか？
zhTW: 你能修正這個句子嗎？
vi: Ban co the sua cau nay khong?

en: I am living in Bangalore since 2003.
ko: 이 문장을 고칠 수 있나요? I am living in Bangalore since 2003.
ja: I am living in Bangalore since 2003.
zhTW: I am living in Bangalore since 2003.
vi: I am living in Bangalore since 2003.

en: We use since to talk about when an activity or situation began.
ko: since는 활동이나 상황이 시작된 시점을 말할 때 씁니다. 예: I've worked at the BBC since 2024.
ja: sinceは活動や状況が始まった時期を話す時に使います。例えば：I have worked at the BBC since 2024.
zhTW: 我們用since來談論活動或情況開始的時間。例如：I have worked at the BBC since 2024.
vi: Chung ta dung since de noi ve thoi diem mot hoat dong bat dau. Vi du: I have worked at the BBC since 2024.

en: For example, I've worked at the BBC since 2024.
ko: since는 활동이나 상황이 시작된 시점을 말할 때 씁니다. 예: I've worked at the BBC since 2024.
ja: 例えば、I have worked at the BBC since 2024.
zhTW: 例如，I have worked at the BBC since 2024。
vi: Vi du, I have worked at the BBC since 2024.

en: I've been working at the BBC since 2024.
ko: I've been working at the BBC since 2024. 두 문장 모두 현재완료를 썼다는 걸 눈치채셨나요?
ja: I have been working at the BBC since 2024. 両方とも現在完了形を使ったことに気づきましたか？
zhTW: I have been working at the BBC since 2024。你注意到我兩句都用了現在完成式嗎？
vi: I have been working at the BBC since 2024. Ban co nhan ra toi dung thi hien tai hoan thanh cho ca hai cau khong?

en: Did you notice that I used the present perfect for both of these sentences?
ko: I've been working at the BBC since 2024. 두 문장 모두 현재완료를 썼다는 걸 눈치채셨나요?
ja: 両方とも現在完了形を使ったことに気づきましたか？
zhTW: 你注意到我兩句都用了現在完成式嗎？
vi: Ban co nhan ra toi dung thi hien tai hoan thanh cho ca hai cau khong?

en: That's because although the action started in 2024,
ko: 행동이 2024년에 시작됐지만 지금도 계속되기 때문입니다.
ja: 行動は2024年に始まったが今も続いているからです。
zhTW: 因為雖然動作從2024年開始，但現在仍然是真的。
vi: Vi hanh dong bat dau tu 2024 nhung van dung cho den bay gio.

en: the situation is still true now.
ko: 행동이 2024년에 시작됐지만 지금도 계속되기 때문입니다.
ja: 今も続いている状況だからです。
zhTW: 情況現在仍然是真的。
vi: Tinh huong van dung cho den bay gio.

en: We can use the present perfect simple,
ko: 현재완료 단순형을 쓸 수 있어요. 주어 + have + 과거분사.
ja: 現在完了単純形を使えます。主語＋have＋過去分詞。
zhTW: 我們可以用現在完成簡單式。主詞加have加過去分詞。
vi: Co the dung thi hien tai hoan thanh don. Chu ngu + have + qua khu phan tu.

en: which is subject plus have plus past participle.
ko: 현재완료 단순형을 쓸 수 있어요. 주어 + have + 과거분사.
ja: 主語＋have＋過去分詞。
zhTW: 主詞加have加過去分詞。
vi: Chu ngu + have + qua khu phan tu.

en: For example, I've played the guitar since I was a teenager.
ko: 예: I've played the guitar since I was a teenager.
ja: 例えば、I have played the guitar since I was a teenager.
zhTW: 例如，I have played the guitar since I was a teenager。
vi: Vi du, I have played the guitar since I was a teenager.

en: Or the present perfect continuous,
ko: 또는 현재완료 진행형, 주어 + have + been + 동사ing.
ja: または現在完了進行形、主語＋have＋been＋動詞ing形。
zhTW: 或是現在完成進行式，主詞加have加been加動詞ing。
vi: Hoac thi hien tai hoan thanh tiep dien, chu ngu + have + been + dong tu ing.

en: which is subject plus have plus been plus the ing form of the verb.
ko: 또는 현재완료 진행형, 주어 + have + been + 동사ing.
ja: 主語＋have＋been＋動詞のing形。
zhTW: 主詞加have加been加動詞ing形式。
vi: Chu ngu + have + been + dong tu dang ing.

en: For example, You have been learning English since 2015.
ko: 예: You have been learning English since 2015.
ja: 例えば、You have been learning English since 2015.
zhTW: 例如，You have been learning English since 2015。
vi: Vi du, You have been learning English since 2015.

en: If the speaker is still living in Bangalore now, they should use the present perfect,
ko: 화자가 아직 방갈로르에 살고 있다면 현재완료를 써야 합니다.
ja: 話者がまだバンガロールに住んでいるなら現在完了形を使うべきです。
zhTW: 如果說話者現在還住在班加羅爾，應該用現在完成式。
vi: Neu nguoi noi van song o Bangalore, nen dung thi hien tai hoan thanh.

en: either the present perfect simple or continuous.
ko: 화자가 아직 방갈로르에 살고 있다면 현재완료를 써야 합니다.
ja: 現在完了単純形か進行形。
zhTW: 現在完成簡單式或進行式。
vi: Hien tai hoan thanh don hoac tiep dien.

en: So let's fix that sentence.
ko: 문장을 고치면: I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.
ja: 文を直しましょう。I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.
zhTW: 讓我們修正那個句子。I have lived in Bangalore since 2003。
vi: Hay sua cau do. I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.

en: I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.
ko: 문장을 고치면: I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.
ja: I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.
zhTW: I have lived in Bangalore since 2003。
vi: I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.

en: Or I have been living in Bangalore since 2003.
ko: 또는 I have been living in Bangalore since 2003. 단순형과 진행형의 차이는?
ja: またはI have been living in Bangalore since 2003. 単純形と進行形の違いは？
zhTW: 或I have been living in Bangalore since 2003。簡單式和進行式有什麼差別？
vi: Hoac I have been living in Bangalore since 2003. Su khac biet giua don va tiep dien la gi?

en: What's the difference between the present perfect simple and the present perfect continuous?
ko: 또는 I have been living in Bangalore since 2003. 단순형과 진행형의 차이는?
ja: 現在完了単純形と現在完了進行形の違いは？
zhTW: 現在完成簡單式和現在完成進行式有什麼差別？
vi: Su khac biet giua hien tai hoan thanh don va tiep dien la gi?

en: Visit our website to find out.
ko: 웹사이트에서 확인하세요.
ja: ウェブサイトで確認してください。
zhTW: 請上我們的網站了解。
vi: Truy cap trang web de tim hieu.
